title: Data Platform Engineering Lead
reason: This is a data platform and engineering leadership role within an autonomy org, but it is not primarily AI/ML model work, and the candidate has strong Python/CV/ML plus some backend/Docker/GCP experience but lacks senior data platform ownership, big data stack, orchestration, SQL depth, Kubernetes, and required management experience.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
reason: This is clearly a software engineering role focused on embedded firmware, RTOS, protocols, and vehicle systems, but the candidate's strongest experience is CV/ML, Python/C++ algorithms, backend, and testing with limited direct evidence of embedded firmware, RTOS, MCU boot, device drivers, CAN, board bring-up, or safety-critical automotive systems.
